assertions.expectation: Explains that Extended channel provides up to 24 months of support vs 14 months for standard channels
assertions.reason: Response clearly states '24-month support lifecycle vs 14 months on Regular'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended channel has additional cost (it's not free)
assertions.reason: The response does not mention any cost implications or that Extended channel incurs additional charges

assertions.expectation: Notes that Extended channel gets the same versions as Regular but keeps them available longer
assertions.reason: The response suggests Extended runs 2-3 versions behind Regular rather than explaining it gets the same versions but keeps them available longer

assertions.expectation: Warns that staying on older versions longer means missing new features and accumulating technical debt
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Slower access to new features' and 'Potential compatibility issues with newer tools/integrations' which addresses technical debt concerns

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command to change the release channel to Extended
assertions.reason: Response provides the exact command: 'gcloud container clusters update CLUSTER_NAME --release-channel extended --zone YOUR_ZONE'

assertions.expectation: Advises checking that the current version (1.31) is available on Extended before switching
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'K8s 1.31 may not be available on Extended channel yet' and provides commands to check available versions

assertions.expectation: Recommends Extended for environments with compliance requirements or slow internal change processes
assertions.reason: The response does not specifically mention compliance requirements or slow internal change processes as use cases for Extended channel

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended doesn't mean you can skip upgrades forever — you still must upgrade within 24 months
assertions.reason: The response does not explicitly state that upgrades are still required within the 24-month window

assertions.expectation: Notes that minor version upgrades on Extended are NOT automated (except at EoS) — customers must plan and initiate them manually
assertions.reason: The response does not mention that upgrades are manual or that automatic upgrades only happen at end-of-support
